# Daria Realty — Russian Real Estate Agents · 30A & Destin, Florida

## About
Daria Realty is a bilingual Russian-English real estate team serving 30A, Destin, and Miramar Beach, Florida. We are Daria "Dasha" Raichenko and Iuri da Silva — a husband-and-wife team of licensed real estate agents fully fluent in Russian and English. We help Russian-speaking clients buy and sell homes, condos, vacation properties, and investment real estate on the Florida Emerald Coast.

## Agents
- Daria "Dasha" Raichenko · Russian-speaking real estate agent · (850) 867-5963
- Iuri da Silva · Real estate agent · (786) 354-3979
- Together: a bilingual couple dedicated to every client

## Languages
- Russian (полный сервис на русском языке)
- English

## Services
- Buy property on 30A, Destin, and Miramar Beach
- Sell property on 30A, Destin, and Miramar Beach
- Investment property on 30A Florida
- Vacation home purchase Destin Florida
- Russian-language real estate consultation — free
- Full transaction support in Russian from search to closing

## Service Area
30A Corridor, Destin, Miramar Beach, Seaside, Rosemary Beach, Alys Beach, Inlet Beach, Santa Rosa Beach, Fort Walton Beach, Panama City Beach — all of the Florida Emerald Coast.

## What Makes Us Different
Daria Realty is one of the only Russian-speaking real estate teams on 30A and Destin. We are a couple who work together on every transaction, giving clients two dedicated agents with full Russian language support. We understand Russian culture, the Russian-speaking community's needs, and the nuances of US real estate for international buyers. No language barrier — ever.

A: Call Daria Realty at (850) 867-5963 (Dasha) or (786) 354-3979 (Iuri). We price, market, and sell your Destin or 30A property with full Russian communication throughout.
